title: Don't Clear Chat History
description: Simple one-mixin mod that doesn't clear the messages you've sent from up arrow on disconnect/relog.
body:
if you are using so many commands and breaking the ^ key repeatedly to get the last used commands, you do not want to lose command history after disconnecting/reconnecting the server.

this is a simple but effective mod.

Available for Fabric/Quilt 1.14+ and Legacy Fabric 1.7.10, 1.8.9, and 1.12.2. **REMEMBER TO SELECT THE CORRECT VERSION!**
